creator: nimaje+fbz@bureaucracy.de
text: Seems like you hit a bug corrected in 13.2-p4, see FreeBSD-EN-23:12.freebsd-update as /usr/include/c++/v1/__string is a file in 13.2 and a directory in 14.0 freebsd-update didn't update these files correctly, manually correcting this should work, but I'm not sure if more than /usr/include/c++/v1/__string is affected
